description: Fragment of a letter from a mother from Alexandria, to her son in Fustat. Second half of 11th century. The mother expresses her interest in the family and deals with money and shipment of goods. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #840) VMR
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
